project_profile.deployment_model: Distributed LLM inference service running on NPU clusters, with HTTP/gRPC endpoints for client requests and inter-node communication via gRPC/IPC

trust_boundaries.untrusted_side: Remote clients (HTTP API users, gRPC clients)

modules.name: http_endpoint
modules.description: HTTP server implementation handling REST API requests for inference. Exposes OpenAI, TGI, vLLM, Triton API endpoints to external clients.

modules.name: grpc_endpoint
modules.description: gRPC endpoint for PD (Prefill-Decode) disaggregation mode. Handles decode requests and KV cache release from prefill nodes.

modules.name: request_handler
modules.description: Request handlers for single LLM inference. Processes prefill, decode, and PnD (Prefill-and-Decode) requests.

modules.name: infer_interface
modules.description: Protocol parsing and inference interface implementations. Parses OpenAI, TGI, vLLM, Triton request formats and dispatches to inference engine.

modules.name: daemon
modules.description: Main daemon process managing service lifecycle. Handles signals, subprocess management, and graceful shutdown.

modules.name: infer_instances
modules.description: Inference instance management. Coordinates batch scheduler, KV cache, and model execution.

modules.name: grpc_communicator
modules.description: gRPC communication for multi-node inference. Handles master-slave coordination, request/response streaming, TLS certificate management.

modules.name: ipc_communicator
modules.description: IPC communication via shared memory and semaphores. Handles request/response serialization between executor processes.

modules.name: config_manager
modules.description: Configuration file parsing and management. Reads config.json, validates parameters, handles dynamic config updates.

modules.name: scheduler
modules.description: Request scheduling and batch management. Implements prefill/decode policies, latency prediction.

modules.name: llm_manager
modules.description: LLM manager with Python API bindings. Manages inference requests, responses, and tensor operations.

modules.name: endpoint_utils
modules.description: Utility functions for endpoint: JSON parsing, parameter checking, base64 encoding, TLS helper, sensitive info management.

modules.name: health_checker
modules.description: Health check and fault recovery. Implements simulated inference for health probing.

modules.name: tokenizer
modules.description: Tokenization handling for inference requests.

modules.name: python_connector
modules.description: Python connector for request handling. Implements shared memory communication and request routing.

modules.name: python_runtime
modules.description: Python runtime for model execution. Includes model implementations, attention layers, sampling, LoRA management.

modules.name: python_server
modules.description: Python server entry point. Launches C++ daemon process.

modules.name: python_text_generator
modules.description: Text generation utilities with C++ bindings.

modules.name: python_utils
modules.description: Python utility modules including logging.

modules.name: proto_definitions
modules.description: Protocol buffer definitions for inter-node and IPC communication.

entry_points.justification: HTTP server listens on configured IP/port, accepting requests from external clients via REST API endpoints
entry_points.description: Initializes HTTP server listening for external client requests

entry_points.justification: HTTP GET endpoints for health checks and service management accessible from external clients
entry_points.description: Registers HTTP GET handlers for health check and status endpoints

entry_points.justification: Business HTTP endpoints for inference requests (OpenAI, TGI, vLLM, Triton APIs) accessible from external clients
entry_points.description: Registers HTTP POST handlers for inference API endpoints

entry_points.justification: gRPC server for inter-node communication in PD disaggregation mode, accessible from prefill nodes
entry_points.description: Initializes gRPC service for decode request handling

entry_points.justification: Master node gRPC server for multi-node inference, accepts connections from slave nodes
entry_points.description: Initializes gRPC server for master-slave coordination

entry_points.justification: Slave node gRPC client connecting to master node for multi-node inference
entry_points.description: Initializes gRPC client connecting to master node

entry_points.justification: Configuration file parsing from config.json, typically managed by administrator
entry_points.description: Parses and validates configuration from JSON file

entry_points.justification: Shared memory IPC setup for executor communication, local process boundary
entry_points.description: Creates shared memory and semaphores for IPC

entry_points.justification: HTTP POST endpoint for loading LoRA adapters from specified paths, accessible from external clients
Command line argument parsing for daemon startup, controlled by administrator
entry_points.description: Parses command line arguments for daemon configuration

attack_surfaces: HTTP REST API (Port configured in serverConfig.port): OpenAI, TGI, vLLM, Triton inference endpoints
HTTP Management API (Port configured in serverConfig.managementPort): Health checks, status, config query
HTTP Metrics API (Port configured in serverConfig.metricsPort): Prometheus metrics
gRPC Inter-node Communication (Port configured in serverConfig.interCommPort): PD disaggregation, multi-node inference
IPC Shared Memory: Executor communication via shared memory and semaphores
Configuration File Parsing: config.json, TLS certificates, CRL files
LoRA Adapter Loading: Dynamic loading of LoRA adapters via API
